directions.reason: Upward pupils and lifted gaze read up.
Face and pupils shift screen-right while pupils and chin remain lifted.
Head and pupils clearly point screen-right; the upward eye line is subtle but readable in the labeled loop.
Strong screen-right face turn with raised pupils.
Profile, nose, and pupils point screen-right.

Nose and pupils point screen-left while eyes and chin begin lifting.

Screen-left turn is retained while pupils and chin lift strongly toward up.

warnings: Blind vertical-3 reverses isolated 045/135 classifications, but labeled normal-size inspection confirms the intended quadrants and the ordered loop remains monotonic.
